title: Inimesed sõdurisinelis
writer: Paul Kuusberg, Jüri Müür, Lembit Remmelgas
actors: Rudolf Allabert, Heino Raudsik, Leonhard Merzin
plot: The story of the war film is about paths of the Estonian Shooting Corps (formed by the Red Army) during the WW-2 and how the fight forms an usual man to a loyal soldier. Ideologic aspects of the movie are more hidden than in ordin...
